events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes digging without an 811 locate on a residential sitework job at rough-complete stage. This is a serious safety and compliance violation. Digging without calling 811 risks striking underground utilities. This is non-compliant and dangerous.

Let me construct the JSON response.

    "Call 811 to request utility locates before any further digging",

  "rationale": "Digging without an 811 locate violates CGA best practices and state one-call requirements. The work cannot be accepted until locates are obtained and verified.",

    "CGA Best Practice 5-1: Call Before You Dig",
